hero.title: Escape The Backrooms Wiki
hero.description: Escape The Backrooms is a 1-4 player co-op horror game where players explore 30+ eerie Backrooms levels, solve exit puzzles, manage sanity, and avoid deadly entities.

gameFeature.description: Explore liminal levels, solve puzzles, avoid entities, and survive with your co-op team in Escape The Backrooms.

escapeTheBackroomsBeginnerGuide.title: Escape The Backrooms Beginner Guide
escapeTheBackroomsBeginnerGuide.intro: Learn the co-op survival loop before tackling long runs and harder levels.

steps.title: Stay grouped early
steps.description: Keep line-of-sight with teammates to reduce early wipes and confusion.

steps.title: Read each level objective
steps.description: Every area has specific escape logic; identify it before sprinting.

steps.title: Preserve stamina and items
steps.description: Waste fewer resources so late-level pressure is easier to handle.

steps.title: Use short callouts
steps.description: Fast location callouts are better than long explanations mid-chase.

quickTips: Move with intent and avoid dead-end exploration.
Keep one player focused on objective tracking.
Reset comms after each encounter to avoid panic chain mistakes.

faq.title: Escape The Backrooms FAQ
faq.subtitle: Key answers for Escape The Backrooms players

questions.question: Is Escape The Backrooms playable solo?
questions.answer: Yes, Escape The Backrooms supports solo play, though co-op improves consistency on difficult routes.

questions.question: Does Escape The Backrooms support crossplay?
questions.answer: Yes, Escape The Backrooms supports cross-platform matchmaking with lobby codes on supported platforms.

questions.question: How many players can join Escape The Backrooms co-op?
questions.answer: Escape The Backrooms supports up to four players in online co-op sessions.

questions.question: What is the best way to start Escape The Backrooms?
questions.answer: Start Escape The Backrooms with the beginner route, objective-first pacing, and short team callouts.

crafting.whatIsDescription: The Apotheosis system is a unique essence-driven fusion mechanic where you combine up to six items to discover new recipes. No fixed crafting menus—experimentation is key.
